(1 comment)

There is a same issue to LU-7437. We shouldn't call lprocfs_param_pattern() inside {list/get}param_display(), otherwise it will add the prefix "/proc/{fs,sys}/{lnet,lustre}" each time so that the parameters can be listed recursively.

parents.subject: Revert "LU-6910 osp: add procfs values for OST reserved size"

commit.subject: LU-5030 utils: add -R parameter to lctl get_param
commit.message:
LU-5030 utils: add -R parameter to lctl get_param

To allow printing all parameters under a specified directory.
This is needed to replace hard-coded /proc pathnames in sanity-sec.sh
test_24, but would also be useful for normal usage.

Signed-off-by: Andreas Dilger <andreas.dilger@intel.com>
